results.rendered_html:
prāyas (von 3. i mit pra) adv. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 .
1〉 zum grössten Theil, meistentheils, meist, gewöhnlich  AK. 3,5,17 .  H. 1529 . (balam) prāya āsītparāṅmukham  MBH. 8,1236 .  KATHĀS. 6,123 . bhūmaṇḍalamidaṃ vainyaḥ prāyaścakre samaṃ vibhuḥ  BHĀG. P. 4,18,29 .  ṚV. PRĀT. 16,5 . 30 .  LĀṬY. 4,11,3 .  MBH. 3,15113 .  SUŚR. 1,167,3 . 176,10 . 2,399,19 . 510,12 .  MEGH. 72 . 91 .  ŚĀK. 158 . 183 , v. l.  Spr. 283 . 479 . 738 . 802 . 886 . 1233 . 1906 —1909 . 3185 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 11,45 . 23,5 .  PAÑCAT. V, 19 .  VID. 112 .  KATHĀS. 30,73 .  PRAB. 8,4 .  DṚṢṬĀNTAŚ. 77 _bei_ HAEB. 224 .  VET. in LA. 36,3 .  DHŪRTAS. 83,4 . prāyodevatā die am meisten vorkommende Gottheit  NIR. 7,4 .
— 2〉 aller Wahrscheinlichkeit nach: tava prājña prasādāddhi [Page4-1151] prāyaḥ prāpsyāmi jīvitam  MBH. 12,4989 .
— Vgl. prāyaśas und prāyeṇa.

results.rendered_html:
prāyas ind.
1 Mostly, generally, as a general rule, for the most part; prāyaḥ pratyayamādhatte svaguṇeṣūttamādaraḥ  Ku. 6. 20 ; prāyo bhṛtyāstyajaṃti pracalitavibhavaṃ svāminaṃ sevamānāḥ  Mu. 4. 21 ; or prāyo gacchati yatra bhāgyaraṃhitastatraiva yāṃtyāpadaḥ  Bh. 2. 90. 
2 In all probability, most likely, probably, perhaps; tava prājñāprasādāddhi prāyaḥ prāpsyābhi jīvitaṃ  Mb. 
3 Abundantly, largely.
